title: ET13338844 - Talent Acquisition Manager (Permanent)
description:
The Company
Our client, in the technology sector, is currently looking for a Talent Acquisition Manager to join their dynamic team.

The Role
Partner closely with hiring managers and key stakeholders to understand workforce needs and deliver end-to-end recruitment support, acting as a trusted advisor to the business and global recruitment team. Leverage market insights, talent acquisition best practices, and data-driven metrics to optimize hiring strategies, improve processes, and report on recruitment effectiveness and progress to leadership. Proactively source, assess, and build pipelines of high-quality talent using diverse channels while ensuring a consistent, engaging candidate experience from initial contact through pre-boarding, positioning the company as an employer of choice.

Your Profile
The ideal candidate brings 8+ years of corporate recruiting experience with a strong ability to think critically, execute effectively, and manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment. They possess excellent communication and interpersonal skills, enabling them to build trusted relationships and influence hiring managers, candidates, and cross-functional partners. A proven track record of sourcing and hiring across diverse functions, including Technology, Engineering, Sales, and HR, is essential, along with a deep understanding of recruitment best practices such as sourcing strategies, candidate assessment, and offer negotiation. The role requires a highly organized, detail-oriented professional who is proficient in ATS platforms, LinkedIn Recruiter, and other recruitment tools and technologies.

Apply Today
Please send your resume, in WORD format only and quote reference number ET13338844, by clicking the apply button. Please note that only short-listed candidates will be contacted.

EA Licence no.: 07C5595 | Tan Yee Le (Elise) EA Registration no.:  R1330020

postedCompany.description:
ROBERT HALF INTERNATIONAL PTE. LTD.


Founded in 1948, Robert Half (NYSE symbol: RHI) pioneered specialised recruitment services and today - with more than 325 staffing locations worldwide - Robert Half is the world's leader in placing accounting, finance, banking and technology professionals on a temporary and permanent basis.

In Singapore, Robert Half operates four divisions:

  • Robert Half Finance and Accounting: Recruitment services for temporary and permanent finance and accounting personnel
  • Robert Half Financial Services: Recruitment services for high-calibre financial services, insurance and banking professionals
  • Robert Half Management Resources: Recruitment services for senior-level finance, accounting and business systems professionals on a project and interim basis
  • Robert Half Technology: Recruitment services for temporary and permanent IT professionals

Robert Half also is the parent company of Protiviti®, a global consulting and internal audit firm composed of experts in risk, advisory and transaction services.
postedCompany.name: ROBERT HALF INTERNATIONAL PTE. LTD.
